thing-type.label: Jellyfin Client
thing-type.description: Represents a running Jellyfin client connected to a server

parameter-group.name: images
parameter-group.label: Now Playing Images
parameter-group.description:
Download cover art for the item currently playing on this device.
Each image type can be enabled independently. All types are disabled by default because image downloads add network load on every session update (every 30 seconds by default).
Supported image types:
  • Primary – Album/movie poster or main cover art
  • Backdrop – Full-resolution background/fanart
  • Logo – Transparent text or graphical logo
  • Thumb – Landscape thumbnail (episode still or wide-format preview)
  • Disc – CD, DVD or Blu-ray disc artwork
  • Art – ClearArt / transparent promotional artwork
  • Banner – Wide horizontal banner (TheTVDB-style)

parameter.name: serialNumber
parameter.label: Device ID
parameter.description: The Jellyfin device ID as reported by the client application.

parameter.name: imagePrimaryEnabled
parameter.label: Enable Primary Image
parameter.description:
Download the primary cover art (album cover, movie poster, or main thumbnail) for the item currently playing.
When enabled, a playing-item-image-primary channel is created automatically.

parameter.name: imagePrimaryWidth
parameter.label: Primary Image Width
parameter.description: Maximum width in pixels for the downloaded primary image. Larger sizes provide better quality but consume more bandwidth and memory.

parameter.name: imageBackdropEnabled
parameter.label: Enable Backdrop Image
parameter.description:
Download the background fanart / backdrop image for the item currently playing. Typically a wide full-resolution scene image.
When enabled, a playing-item-image-backdrop channel is created automatically.

parameter.name: imageBackdropWidth
parameter.label: Backdrop Image Width
parameter.description: Maximum width in pixels for the downloaded backdrop image. Larger sizes provide better quality but consume more bandwidth and memory.

parameter.name: imageLogoEnabled
parameter.label: Enable Logo Image
parameter.description:
Download the transparent text or graphical logo for the item currently playing.
When enabled, a playing-item-image-logo channel is created automatically.

parameter.name: imageLogoWidth
parameter.label: Logo Image Width
parameter.description: Maximum width in pixels for the downloaded logo image. Larger sizes provide better quality but consume more bandwidth and memory.

parameter.name: imageThumbEnabled
parameter.label: Enable Thumb Image
parameter.description:
Download the landscape thumbnail (wide-format still or episode preview) for the item currently playing.
When enabled, a playing-item-image-thumb channel is created automatically.

parameter.name: imageThumbWidth
parameter.label: Thumb Image Width
parameter.description: Maximum width in pixels for the downloaded thumb image. Larger sizes provide better quality but consume more bandwidth and memory.

parameter.name: imageDiscEnabled
parameter.label: Enable Disc Image
parameter.description:
Download the CD, DVD or Blu-ray disc artwork for the item currently playing.
When enabled, a playing-item-image-disc channel is created automatically.

parameter.name: imageDiscWidth
parameter.label: Disc Image Width
parameter.description: Maximum width in pixels for the downloaded disc image. Larger sizes provide better quality but consume more bandwidth and memory.

parameter.name: imageArtEnabled
parameter.label: Enable Art Image
parameter.description:
Download the ClearArt (transparent promotional artwork) for the item currently playing.
When enabled, a playing-item-image-art channel is created automatically.

parameter.name: imageArtWidth
parameter.label: Art Image Width
parameter.description: Maximum width in pixels for the downloaded art image. Larger sizes provide better quality but consume more bandwidth and memory.

parameter.name: imageBannerEnabled
parameter.label: Enable Banner Image
parameter.description:
Download the wide horizontal banner (TheTVDB-style) for the item currently playing.
When enabled, a playing-item-image-banner channel is created automatically.

parameter.name: imageBannerWidth
parameter.label: Banner Image Width
parameter.description: Maximum width in pixels for the downloaded banner image. Larger sizes provide better quality but consume more bandwidth and memory.
